full_text:
Wang Kang 王伉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Kang (王伉). Defended Yongchang against Yong Kai’s attack, credited success to Lu Kai. Wang Kang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
